data.title: Warsh's Nomination Hearing Set for Tuesday
data.description: The U.S. Senate Banking Committee has scheduled the confirmation hearing for Warsh's nomination at 10:00 AM EST on Tuesday. According to NS3.AI, this hearing presents the first substantial opportunity to assess Warsh's position. Adam Button noted the significance of this event, while Politico reported that Warsh's testimony was leaked prior to the session.

data.title: C1 Fund Exits Ripple Investment with 150% Return in Four Months
data.description: C1 Fund has announced a partial exit from its investment in Ripple, achieving an estimated 150% return in under four months. According to NS3.AI, the fund did not reveal the exact profit amount but expressed its intention to continue investing in high-quality cryptocurrency companies. This move reflects C1 Fund's strategic approach to capitalizing on lucrative opportunities within the crypto market.

data.title: Kelp: The reason for the theft was that LayerZero's RPC nodes were compromised, and the 1/1 DVN configuration was set to LayerZero's default settings.
data.description: Kelp DAO officially addressed the theft incident in a post on X, stating that the theft was caused by the compromise of two RPC nodes hosted by LayerZero, while a third RPC node suffered a DDoS attack. This was an attack targeting LayerZero infrastructure; Kelp's own system was not involved in the construction or operation of this infrastructure. The 1/1 DVN configuration is the solution documented in LayerZero's documentation and is the default setting for all new OFT deployments. Kelp has been running on LayerZero infrastructure since January 2024 and has maintained open communication with the LayerZero team. During Kelp's expansion to Layer2, the DVN configuration issue was discussed, and the default configuration was clearly confirmed to be appropriate at that time. Kelp's current priority is to protect user interests and prevent the spread of risks within the DeFi ecosystem. The team is collaborating with various parties within the ecosystem to analyze the impact, garner support, and explore all possible mitigation solutions.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Remains Steady at 38
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index is currently at 38, showing no change from the previous day. According to NS3.AI, this index measures the performance of the top 100 cryptocurrencies, excluding stablecoins and wrapped tokens, against Bitcoin over a 90-day period.

data.title: A certain whale sold 497.73 ETH and bought 3.845 billion ASTEROID in the past two days.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale sold 497.73 ETH and bought 3.845 billion ASTEROID in the past two days, with an average purchase price of $0.00029. The whale still holds 369.28 ETH and may continue to buy.

data.title: Bloomberg: Market forecasts are pushing for increased lobbying in Washington to cope with tightening regulations.
data.description: As the U.S. Congress considers stronger regulations, the prediction market industry is intensifying its lobbying efforts in Washington in response to criticism that it fuels gambling expansion and poses potential insider trading risks. Leading platforms, such as Kalshi, along with several cryptocurrency and sports betting companies involved in prediction markets, are forming lobbying teams to influence the legislative process and ease regulatory pressure. Industry insiders worry that regulatory action against this multi-billion dollar sector may accelerate. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Justin Sun Deposits Significant USDC Amount into Spark
data.description: Justin Sun has made a substantial deposit into Spark, according to Foresight News. Eight hours ago, Sun transferred a total of 105 million USDC to Spark, alongside a previous deposit of 53,665 ETH. The combined value of these deposits reaches $174 million. Currently, Spark's USDC deposit pool has a total value locked (TVL) of $467 million, with Sun's contributions accounting for nearly 22.5% of the pool.

data.title: Prediction Market Industry Intensifies Lobbying Efforts Amid U.S. Regulatory Scrutiny
data.description:
The prediction market industry is ramping up its lobbying efforts in Washington as the U.S. Congress considers tightening regulations. According to Odaily, this move comes in response to criticisms that the industry may be contributing to the expansion of gambling and posing risks of potential insider trading.

Leading platforms like Kalshi, along with several crypto and sports betting companies involved in prediction markets, are forming lobbying teams to influence legislative processes and alleviate regulatory pressures. Industry insiders are concerned that regulatory actions targeting this multi-billion-dollar sector may accelerate.

data.title: South Korean crypto venture capital firm Hashed Ventures raises 3 billion won.
data.description: South Korean crypto venture capital firm Hashed Ventures announced it has secured 3 billion won (US$2.2 million) in funding, with participation from Hecto Group's Hecto Innovation and Hecto Financial. The new funds will be injected into Hashed Venture Investment Fund No. 3, primarily supporting new businesses such as digital asset wallets and stablecoin payment settlements. (Digitaltoday)

data.title: Ethereum's Spark Protocol Sees Significant TVL Increase After Aave Incident
data.description:
On April 21, Ethereum's lending protocol Spark experienced a notable increase in its total value locked (TVL), according to BlockBeats. Following an incident involving Aave, Spark's TVL rose by $668 million, reaching $4.395 billion.

A significant portion of this growth, approximately 26%, was attributed to Justin Sun, who reportedly deposited assets valued at $174 million into Spark. This development highlights the impact of individual contributions on the protocol's overall value.

data.title: Hashed Ventures Secures $2.2 Million Investment for New Initiatives
data.description: Hashed Ventures, a South Korean crypto venture capital firm, has announced a 3 billion KRW ($2.2 million) investment. According to Odaily, the funding comes from Hecto Group's subsidiaries, Hecto Innovation and Hecto Financial. The new capital will be directed towards Hashed Ventures' 'Hashed Venture Investment Fund No. 3,' focusing on supporting new business areas such as digital asset wallets and stablecoin payment settlements.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Claude Desktop Allegedly Installs Secret Browser Backdoor
data.description: Claude Desktop has been accused of secretly installing a backdoor file into browsers, according to Odaily. The disclosure was made by SlowMist CISO @im23pads on the X platform. When users install the Claude Desktop application, it reportedly writes a special file into all Chromium-based browsers on the computer without the user's knowledge. This file acts as a pre-authorized backdoor, which, when used with specific browser extensions, can grant complete control over the user's browser.

data.title: A whale withdrew 18,300 ETH from Binance, of which 12,000 ETH were sold to repay an Aave loan.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale withdrew 18,300 ETH from Binance, worth $42.18 million. Of these, 12,000 ETH were sold to repay an Aave loan. The whale still holds 6,315 $ETH (worth $14.62 million), which it will likely sell soon.

data.title: Aave Releases Update on rsETH Event with Debt Management Scenarios
data.description:
On April 21, Aave released an update regarding the rsETH event, outlining two scenarios for managing bad debt. According to BlockBeats, the first scenario involves socializing the losses across the entire chain, while the second limits the losses to L2 rsETH.

Aave also stated that Aave DAO service providers and ecosystem participants are jointly leading efforts to address any bad debt issues. This initiative has received several preliminary commitments from various parties. It is reported that the Aave DAO protocol treasury holds reserves of approximately $181 million.

data.title: BNB Plus Faces Nasdaq Delisting Threat Due to Stock Price Issues
data.description:
BNB Plus has disclosed receiving a notification from Nasdaq regarding its non-compliance with the minimum stock price requirement of $1, which threatens its continued listing. According to Odaily, the company is ineligible for a standard remediation period due to a reverse stock split conducted in the past year. BNB Plus has applied for a hearing, and its shares will remain traded on Nasdaq until a decision is made.

Additionally, BNB Plus announced that its board has approved the evaluation of strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value. Potential options include mergers, reverse mergers, asset sales, joint ventures, and financing transactions. As of now, the value of its crypto treasury assets is approximately $12.2 million.

data.title: U.S. Midterm Elections Could Shift Crypto Policy to Executive Orders
data.description: The upcoming U.S. midterm elections may lead to a shift in crypto policy, with a potential focus on executive orders if the House of Representatives is lost by U.S. President Donald Trump. According to PANews, the urgency surrounding key legislative opportunities is prompting the industry to actively push for progress in the legislative process to seize these opportunities for certainty. The window for core legislation is tight, and stakeholders are working diligently to influence the outcome.

data.title: The leak of Warsh's testimony has sparked controversy, and the hearing may not be as captivating as usual.
data.description: The U.S. Senate Banking Committee will hold its confirmation hearing for Warsh's nomination at 10:00 AM ET on Tuesday (10:00 PM Beijing time). Foreign exchange analyst Adam Button stated that Warsh has maintained a remarkably low profile since his nomination, meaning tomorrow will be the first real opportunity for the outside world to understand his stance. The market is already familiar with Warsh before his nomination; his resume sounds hawkish. His dovish leanings lie in his belief that productivity is about to surge, therefore interest rates should be lowered. This aligns perfectly with Trump's wishes. Senators will take note of this, and he will face questioning. Politico's reporting suggests he will at least go through the motions. I don't know if anyone will believe what he says, but once Trump drops the investigation into Powell, his confirmation is essentially a done deal. Tomorrow is a hearing, not a vote. What disturbs me is that his testimony was leaked to Politico, which is terrible for a position requiring strict information control. There is only one issue that truly matters to the currency market and interest rates: independence. Will Warsh defend it, evade it, or comply? How tough will he be? Can he convince the audience without saying the things that led Trump to withdraw his nomination? Given all the drama surrounding Iran, this hearing won't be as high-profile as usual. (Jin Shi)

data.title: DeFi's Growth Through Challenges Highlighted by Dragonfly Partner
data.description:
Dragonfly partner Haseeb Qureshi recently shared insights on the X platform, emphasizing the growth of decentralized finance (DeFi) through repeated challenges. According to Odaily, Qureshi pointed out that despite setbacks such as the Terra collapse, the 2020 'Black Thursday' liquidation failure, and the 2022 stETH de-pegging incident, the industry has consistently progressed through corrections. He compared this evolution to traditional finance's development path, citing the 2008 financial crisis and the savings and loan crisis of the 1980s as examples of systems improving amid crises.

Qureshi stressed that these failures are not fatal, as DeFi's core still possesses risk control and system resilience. He highlighted Aave's ability to handle potential bad debts with sufficient capital buffers. He believes that intense discussions around improvement strategies are crucial for DeFi's ongoing evolution and reiterated his long-term optimism for DeFi and its community development.

data.title: U.S. Senate to Hold Confirmation Hearing for Walsh's Nomination
data.description:
The U.S. Senate Banking Committee is set to conduct a confirmation hearing for Walsh's nomination on Tuesday at 10 a.m. Eastern Time (UTC+8 22:00). According to Odaily, foreign exchange analyst Adam Button noted that Walsh has maintained a low profile since his nomination, making this hearing a key opportunity to understand his stance. Walsh is known for his hawkish resume, but his dovish inclination lies in his belief that productivity is set to rise, suggesting a need for lower interest rates. This aligns with U.S. President Donald Trump's preferences, which senators are likely to scrutinize.

A report from Politico suggests that Walsh's confirmation is almost assured once Trump ceases his investigation into Powell. The hearing is not a voting session, but concerns have been raised about the leak of Walsh's testimony to Politico, which is considered a significant breach for a position requiring strict information control. The primary question for the foreign exchange market and interest rates is Walsh's stance on independence. Observers are keen to see whether he will defend it, avoid it, or comply with directives. His ability to convey strength without provoking Trump to withdraw his nomination is under scrutiny, especially amid the ongoing tensions surrounding Iran. The hearing is expected to be more notable than usual due to these circumstances.

data.title: Cavaliers Lead Raptors in NBA Playoffs Amid Betting Activity
data.description:
A significant betting activity has been observed in the Polymarket prediction event for the NBA playoffs between the Cleveland Cavaliers and the Toronto Raptors. According to Odaily, an account with nearly $3 million in profits purchased $130,000 worth of bets on the Cavaliers defeating the Raptors, with an average opening price of 79¢. Additionally, the account invested $20,000 on the total score being less than 221.5, with an average opening price of 48.1¢.

The game, which began at 7 a.m. UTC+8, is currently at halftime with the Cavaliers leading the Raptors 52-45. The Cavaliers are ahead in the series with a 1-0 lead.
